task.prompt: Write a function `is_anagram(a, b)` that returns True if two strings are anagrams of each other.

gold_spec.goal: Return True iff a and b contain the same characters with the same multiplicities, case-insensitively and ignoring whitespace.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: True iff a and b are anagrams under the normalization policy

preconditions: a and b are both str
postconditions: result is True iff sorted(a.lower().replace(' ', '')) == sorted(b.lower().replace(' ', ''))
edge_cases: two empty strings are anagrams (both reduce to empty after normalization)
case is ignored: 'Listen' and 'Silent' are anagrams
whitespace is ignored: 'conversation' and 'voices rant on' are anagrams
punctuation IS significant — not stripped before comparison
non-ASCII characters compared case-insensitively where the language supports it; behavior on combining marks is unspecified
